questions.question_text: The mean age of a second year class of a school is $18\frac{2}{5}$. At the end of the promotion examination, $3$ students aged $20$, $19$ and $19$ years were repeated. The new mean age of the class became $18\frac{1}{3}$. Calculate the number of students who were in the class before the promotion examination.

sub_questions.question_text: (a) In a certain spider web, the lengths of the shortest and longest threads are $3.4$ mm and $50.2$ mm respectively. The successive equally spaced threads are $1.2$ mm apart. If the length of the cross threads form an Arithmetic Progression (A.P), find the number of cross threads.

(b) At noon, a cargo plane leaves Lusaka airport and heads towards Kitwe $500$ km away at $180$ km/h. At $1{:}00$ pm, a jet takes off from Lusaka and flies on the same course at $450$ km/h. What time will the jet overtake the cargo plane?

questions.question_text: A man left an estate for his wife, extended family and children; Owusu, Nancy and Esther. In the will, $\frac{1}{3}$ of the estate must be given to Owusu, $\frac{1}{3}$ of the remaining to Nancy, $\frac{3}{4}$ of what still remains to Esther, $\frac{2}{3}$ of the remaining to the wife and the rest to the extended family. If the wife received a total of $GH₵ 105,500.00$ as her share of the estate, find the:

sub_questions.question_text: (b) extended family's share of the estate.

questions.question_text: In the diagram, $MNR$ is a right angle triangle. $|MN| = 15$ m, $|MR| = 10\sqrt{3}$ m and $\angle MQN = $72^{\circ}$$. Calculate, correct to the nearest whole number:

sub_questions.question_text: (a) the value of the angle marked $x$;
